params.name: Montgolfier Balloon
params.description:
On Sept 11, 1783 AD, the Montgolfier Brothers from France were permitted to give an air balloon show to the king.
The Montgolfier Balloon is the first hot-air balloon on Earth. It's made of taffeta with a layer of a special fire-proof paint coat. To raise funds, the Montgolfier brothers once did an experiment in front of Louis XVI. They put a sheep, a duck, and a chicken in the air balloon. After an eight-minute flight, these animals landed safely. Thanks to the experiment, they managed to co …
